rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Plan files may fail to write to disk due to permission prompts; plan text is still submitted even if file write fails","scope":"plan mode"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Priority labels use a `priority:` prefix (e.g., `priority:high`, `priority:medium`, `priority:low`)","scope":"kody taskify"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When GH/MCP credentials are unavailable, `kody taskify` can run in local mode with `--file`, writing output to a JSON file","scope":"kody taskify"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Taskify sub-issue bodies must contain ## Context, ## Acceptance Criteria, and ## Test Strategy sections","scope":"kody taskify"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Kahn's algorithm is a reliable programmatic approach for verifying topological order of depends-on relationships","scope":"verify-taskify.ts"}]}
